description:
You are an artifact-repository curator.  
A comma-separated inventory already exists at  
  /home/user/incoming/artifact_inventory.csv  

Your job is to turn that CSV into a very small JSON manifest and an accompanying log file.

Steps the automated grader will check:

1. Create a new directory  
   /home/user/artifact_reports  

2. From the CSV, select only those rows that meet **both** of these conditions  
   • status column equals the literal string “approved”  
   • repository column starts with the literal prefix “stable-”  

3. Write a JSON file named  
   /home/user/artifact_reports/stable_approved_artifacts.json  

   Formatting rules (strictly enforced):  
   • The file must contain a single JSON array.  
   • Each element of the array is an object with exactly four keys, appearing in this order:  
     id (integer), name (string), repository (string), sha256 (string).  
   • The objects must be sorted in ascending order by the numeric id value.  
   • No extra keys, no trailing commas.  
   • Whitespace is ignored, but newlines are recommended for readability.

4. Create a plain-text log file named  
   /home/user/artifact_reports/report.log  

   It must contain exactly two lines, each terminated with a single newline character:  
   TOTAL=<number_of_rows_in_the_original_CSV>  
   INCLUDED=<number_of_rows_written_to_JSON>

When you are finished there should be exactly two new files inside /home/user/artifact_reports. The automated tests will read both files and verify their precise contents and counts, so follow the formatting instructions carefully.
truth:
Initial filesystem state before the agent starts:

1. Directory /home/user/incoming exists (0700).  
2. File /home/user/incoming/artifact_inventory.csv (0600) with the exact 9 lines shown below  
   (each line ends with a single LF):

id,name,repository,sha256,status
1,alpha,stable-core,111aaa,approved
2,beta,testing-core,222bbb,rejected
3,gamma,stable-core,333ccc,approved
4,delta,stable-utils,444ddd,approved
5,epsilon,stable-core,555eee,pending
6,zeta,experimental,666fff,approved
7,eta,stable-utils,777ggg,rejected
8,theta,stable-core,888hhh,approved

Expected files after successful task completion:

A. /home/user/artifact_reports/stable_approved_artifacts.json (0644).  
   Content (exactly 5 lines, LF line endings):

[
  {"id":1,"name":"alpha","repository":"stable-core","sha256":"111aaa"},
  {"id":3,"name":"gamma","repository":"stable-core","sha256":"333ccc"},
  {"id":4,"name":"delta","repository":"stable-utils","sha256":"444ddd"},
  {"id":8,"name":"theta","repository":"stable-core","sha256":"888hhh"}
]

B. /home/user/artifact_reports/report.log (0644).  
   Content (exactly 2 lines, LF line endings):

TOTAL=8
INCLUDED=4
name: task_000000_e7cda24f
